accepted.bullet_text: [[war-gatewatch-triumph-cycle]] — the cycle's blue / Jace entry, instantiating all three designer-coordinated template axes the cohort node identifies: the mechanical template (`"Draw two cards. If you control a Jace planeswalker, draw three cards instead."` is the `{2}{U}` sorcery conditional-upgrade slot), the flavor template (`"His triumph was not in outsmarting Bolas's plan, but in understanding why ultimate power is self-defeating."` matches the cohort's `"<Name>'s triumph came not from <X>, but from <Y>"` construction verbatim), and the visual template (Kieran Yanner portrait of the named Gatewatch founder at a resolution beat). The cohort frames this entry's flavor as the cognitive triumph — *"the mind-mage's resolution is comprehension, not conquest"* — the cycle's in-set callback to Jace's Defeat (HOU no. 38). `[cohort node body: The design thesis section; Scryfall flavor_text + oracle_text]`
accepted.archetype_slot: Triumph cycle blue / Jace entry — designer-coordinated three-axis template instantiation (mechanical + flavor + visual), per the cohort's 'The design thesis' section. Cohort body explicitly names Jace's triumph as 'the cognitive triumph; the mind-mage's resolution is comprehension, not conquest'.
